positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos_claim.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~sucks(duster)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    sucks(space)).

cnf(u22,negated_conjecture,
    ~sucks(sK0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    vacuum(space)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~vacuum(X0) | sucks(X0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    space != duster).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define plunger(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define vampire(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define household_appliance(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for neg_claim.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for neg_claim.tptp
5. household_appliance(duster) [input(axiom)]
6. ~sucks(duster) [input(axiom)]
8. ? [X0] : (household_appliance(X0) & ~sucks(X0)) [input(conjecture)]
9. ~? [X0] : (household_appliance(X0) & ~sucks(X0)) [negated conjecture 8]
13. ! [X0] : (~household_appliance(X0) | sucks(X0)) [ennf transformation 9]
16. household_appliance(duster) [cnf transformation 5]
17. ~sucks(duster) [cnf transformation 6]
19. ~household_appliance(X0) | sucks(X0) [cnf transformation 13]
20. sucks(duster) [resolution 16,19]
21. $false [forward subsumption resolution 20,17]
% SZS output end Proof for neg_claim.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
